contracts.additional_description: Mapping of vehicle class ID based on file_id and file_summary_capability table -  mapping file to bin scheme

contract.description: Mapping of vehicle class ID to volume count -- e.g., for datalens files use datalens_alias { 'cl2_passenger_car': 23, 'cl12_truck_multi_traile': 45 }

$class identifier.description: Volume count for the vehicle class identified by datalens alias
